_meta.description: D6 fixtures for google-adk / gen-ui-open-advanced (open-gen-ui-advanced demo)

fixtures._comment: Disabled: prior matcher 'Inline expression evaluator' shadowed the working LGP-aligned matcher in gen-ui-open.json (same userMessage, same context, but missing the jsFunctions field on generateSandboxedUi arguments — without jsFunctions the Evaluate button has no click handler and the open-gen-ui-advanced.spec.ts 'typing + clicking Evaluate fires host evaluateExpression handler' test fails). gen-ui-open.json owns this pill; userMessage renamed to a non-matching sentinel so this entry is effectively dead. Mirrors LGP (which has no gen-ui-open-advanced.json file at all — the inline evaluator fixture lives entirely in gen-ui-open.json).
Disabled: prior matcher 'Inline expression evaluator' / hasToolResult:true shadowed gen-ui-open.json's toolCallId-based follow-up. See sibling disabled entry above.
